purpose: Pre-F2 postflight bug: findArtifactPath returned null for code-sprint task type, CLI exited 1 with 'could not infer artifact path'. Driver mistook this for gate-fail and burned 3 patch rounds. With L0 envelope, this MUST emit precondition-fail (NOT gate-fail) so driver routes to mark-gate-broken instead of patch-round.
anti_pattern_being_tested: Driver sees exit 1, treats as gate-fail, runs patch-round. Layer 0 doctrine: driver never infers semantics from exit code alone.
